candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line and equals Net sales across years; suitable as top-line reported revenue.
Also a valid top-line revenue label; appears identical to Total Revenue and can serve as fallback across years.

variables.notes: Priority list for revenue line; later code should take first non-missing value.
No clear cost of goods sold / cost of sales line is present. 'Distribution costs' is SG&A/selling, not COGS.

candidates.why: Overhead-type operating expense bucket; appropriate SG&A component.
Service/admin overhead component within operating expenses.
Core overhead personnel cost; appropriate SG&A component.
Residual operating overhead bucket; appropriate SG&A component.

variables.notes: No explicit populated SG&A total row is present. Selected overhead component rows from the candidate list and excluded depreciation/amortization, interest, taxes, balancing items, and totals.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line on the income statement; best match for XRD.
Balance sheet asset, not period R&D expense; not appropriate if explicit expense exists.

variables.notes: Used explicit income statement R&D expense; excluded capitalized development expenditures because it is a balance sheet asset, not expense.

candidates.why: Broad finance cost line; fallback if more specific interest expense lines are missing.
Specific interest expense component related to leases.
Most direct and preferred interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; useful fallback if primary line items are missing.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority list ordered from most specific preferred interest expense to broader finance cost fallback.

candidates.why: Equity line, but owner/parent-attributable line is preferred when available.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to the parent companys shareholders
candidates.why: Best match because it explicitly excludes non-controlling interests and is attributable to parent shareholders.
Balancing item, not an accounting line to use when a proper equity line exists.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity

candidates.why: Total balance sheet size, not book equity.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to the parent companys shareholders

variables.notes: Priority list prefers parent-attributable equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income statement comprehensive income subtotal, not a balance sheet non-controlling interest line.

variables.notes: No balance sheet line for minority interest / non-controlling interests is present. Left blank so MIB is treated as 0.
